legalNote: This document is provided in multiple languages for your convenience. In case of any conflict or discrepancy between language versions, the English version shall prevail.

hero.subtitle: ScoreHunter is a free football prediction game. Make your picks, show off your football knowledge, beat your rivals and become the champion. No deposits, no risk, just fun.

howItWorks.title: The game in a nutshell
howItWorks.subtitle: No betting. No coupons. Just your football brain against everyone else's.

steps.title: Pick the matches
steps.description: Pick your favourite matches from the leagues unlocked each game week.

steps.title: Make your predictions
steps.description: Make your picks in Score Hunt and Mini Games modes.

steps.title: Climb the rankings
steps.description: Beat your rivals with the points you collect, win trophies and rise to the top.

rules.title: All you need is a passion for football
rules.howIntro: ScoreHunter rewards football knowledge. No coupons, no handicaps, no odds — none of that betting jargon. Every league, every match, every team has equal value and importance. Every player starts with the same shot.
howItems: Each week, a curated set of fixtures unlocks for predictions.
Players are expected to make predictions on those matches in Score Hunt and Mini Games modes.
Players earn points based on the results of the predictions they make.
There are three separate rankings — Overall, Score Hunt, and Mini Games. Each week, the players in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place are awarded trophies.
The Overall ranking each week is calculated as the sum of points earned in Score Hunt and Mini Games.
In rewarded seasons, prizes are distributed based on Overall ranking achievements.
In Score Hunt, players are expected to predict scores for 12 matches in total — 10 main and 2 bonus.
Predictions are scored in detail across multiple criteria: correct win direction, correct draw, correct goal count, correct goal difference, correct exact score, and correct rare prediction.
In Score Hunt, players can apply the 2X joker to one of their picks to double the points earned from that match.
Bonus predictions replace the lowest-scoring picks among the main predictions.
Pro users are entitled to create one backup prediction list in Score Hunt.
At the end of the week, only the higher-scoring of the two prediction lists counts.
In Mini Games mode, predictions are made on events that occur during matches.
Players select a number of matches or teams as required by the concept.
Each mini game has its own concept and points value.
The number, points, and targets of the mini games can vary based on the weekly fixture count.
Players are entitled to add 1 bonus match or team for each mini game.
To succeed in a mini game, you need to make as many correct predictions as the game's target.
The bonus prediction replaces the first failed prediction.
Successful mini games award a fixed reward based on their difficulty.
Failed mini games award only the participation point.
rules.scoringIntro: In Score Hunt, every detail you get right earns points. You don't have to nail the exact score.
rules.scoringNote: When you earn the Perfect Prediction Bonus on a match, the Goal Difference Bonus is not awarded. The Rare Prediction Bonus is calculated from the percentage of users who picked the same prediction for that match that week.
rules.miniGamesIntro: Each mini game has its own concept and a fixed reward based on its difficulty. When you succeed you earn the points below; even if you fail, you get a flat +25 participation point.

miniGames.name: Goal Match
miniGames.rule: The match has 3 or more goals in total.

miniGames.name: Goal Scorer
miniGames.rule: Your chosen team scores 3 or more goals in the match.

miniGames.name: Early Bird
miniGames.rule: Your chosen team scores the first goal of the match.

miniGames.name: Goal Duel
miniGames.rule: Both teams score at least 1 goal.

miniGames.name: Clean Sheet
miniGames.rule: Your chosen team finishes the match without conceding.

miniGames.name: Goal Rain
miniGames.rule: The match has 5 or more goals in total.

miniGames.name: Penalty Beast
miniGames.rule: At least 1 penalty goal is scored in the match.

miniGames.name: Hard Man
miniGames.rule: At least 1 red card is shown in the match.

miniGames.name: Friendly Fire
miniGames.rule: At least 1 own goal is scored in the match.

generalRulesItems: You enter the contest only when you confirm your prediction list. Unconfirmed lists are not scored.
Don't forget to confirm before the first match on your list kicks off. The list cannot be edited once a match has started.
Predictions are scored on regular time only (90 minutes). Extra time and penalty shootouts do not count.
No points are awarded for matches that are postponed, cancelled, or suspended.
The Overall ranking is calculated weekly: Score Hunt + Mini Games combined.
Results are calculated automatically when the week ends. Match scores are updated live — you can follow along in real time.
When there is a points tie in the standings, the tie is broken in this order: first by total season points, then by the number of gold, silver, and bronze trophies won — from highest to lowest.
AI-powered anomaly detection runs during scoring. All lists from users found cheating are voided.
You must be 13 or older to take part.
rules.rewardsPlaceholder:
Because our launch falls in the closing weeks of the 2025-2026 season, a fair competitive environment isn't possible — so we've named the rest of the season the "Training Season".

Use this season to explore the game and share any bugs or suggestions with us, and get ready for the World Cup Season.

Our rewarded seasons begin with the World Cup. Until then, stay tuned and stick with us.

features.title: We're working to give you more than just a game
features.subtitle: Gourmet features for the elite football fan

items.title: Score Hunt
items.description: Our main game mode. Predict match results. Earn points for every right call. You don't have to be perfect.

items.title: Mini Games
items.description: Our second game mode. Sometimes football is about more than just the score. Predict the events. Have fun and earn extra points.

items.title: Leagues
items.description: Compete on a separate leaderboard with your friends, family, or any community you belong to. And you set the rules of these leagues yourselves.

items.title: Trophies
items.description: Top 3 finishers in weekly and seasonal rankings add a trophy to their cabinet — and qualify for the Champions League the following season.

items.title: Pro Membership
items.description: A dedicated membership tier for users who want an ad-free experience and a few optional perks.

items.title: Live Scores
items.description: Becoming a live-score app isn't our priority, but we built a clean and functional interface for following matches in real time.

screenshots.title: We aimed for fun and functional in equal measure
screenshots.subtitle: Clean, intuitive menus

items.a: Yes — fully free to download and play. There's an optional Pro membership for extras like reduced ads, but the core game is free for everyone.
No. ScoreHunter has no betting, no odds, no money in or out. All matches are equal value and prizes are promotional only — never cash.
Yes. Sign in with Apple or Google in seconds — no passwords, no email verification.
Of course. Create a private league, share the invite link, and let the bragging rights begin.
iPhone (iOS 14+) and Android (Android 8+). One account works across both.

finalCta.title: Come and join us
finalCta.subtitle: Download ScoreHunter, make your predictions, show off your football knowledge. No risk! Just fun.
finalCta.freeBadge: 100% free · No credit card · Apple & Google sign-in

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: To request the deletion of your account and all associated data, please fill in the form below. This will open your email client with a pre-filled message to our support team.
deleteAccount.confirmCodeNote: You can get your confirm code from the app settings.
deleteAccount.info: Your request will be processed within 30 days. You will receive a confirmation email once your account has been deleted.
deleteAccount.emailBodyMessage: I would like to request the deletion of my account and all associated data.

support.title: Support
support.intro: We're here to help. Pick a topic below and we'll open an email pre-filled with the right subject so we can get back to you faster.
support.directContact: Or write to us directly at
support.responseNote: We aim to reply within 2 business days. For account deletion requests, please use our
